title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Brûlée, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Katakuri, Unknown person #4 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tip of the spear swivels towards him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do not die because they want to.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Deaths are, for the most part, unwanted occurrences.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! Hurry up and get killed al- ready, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Isn't just your average underfeated fighter!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since the day he was born, this man has never once fallen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The very moment he was born, he got up, sat himself down in a chair, and fell asleep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And from that legendary beginning, never once has he ever laid down! He looks down on the ground itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Always gallant, calm-headed, and powerful. Every- thing about him is perfect.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the kind of person our brother dogtooth is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the greatest fruit the Charlotte family tree has ever produced!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm shocked that a low-life like you has the gall to even challenge him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare lay your hand on my sister.

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
